entries.source: Ask for subject, level, time limit, and question types if missing.
entries.value: छुटेको भए subject, level, time limit, र question types माग्नुहोस्।

entries.source: Ask for subjects, deadlines, resources, and pain points.
entries.value: subjects, deadlines, resources, र pain points माग्नुहोस्।

entries.source: Ask for subjects, time spent, wins, misses, and upcoming deadlines.
entries.value: subjects, time spent, wins, misses, र upcoming deadlines माग्नुहोस्।

entries.source: Ask for the data, context, and question being answered.
entries.value: data, context, र जवाफ दिइरहेको question माग्नुहोस्।

entries.source: Ask for the diagram parts or subject, then generate a label list and practice round.
entries.value: diagram parts वा subject माग्नुहोस्, त्यसपछि label list र practice round generate गर्नुहोस्।

entries.source: Ask for the habit, current obstacle, and easiest starting version.
entries.value: habit, current obstacle, र सबैभन्दा सजिलो starting version माग्नुहोस्।

entries.source: Ask for the learning context and behaviors worth rewarding.
entries.value: learning context र reward गर्न लायक behaviors माग्नुहोस्।

entries.source: Ask for the note set, subject, and desired organization style.
entries.value: note set, subject, र desired organization style माग्नुहोस्।

entries.source: Ask for the one highest-impact revision priority, then rewrite the paragraph yourself.
entries.value: सबैभन्दा high-impact revision priority एउटा माग्नुहोस्, त्यसपछि paragraph आफैं rewrite गर्नुहोस्।

entries.source: Ask for the passage or title and the learner's goal.
entries.value: passage वा title र learner को goal माग्नुहोस्।

entries.source: Ask for the prerequisite ideas, a plain-language model, one example, one practice task, and one way to test understanding.
entries.value: prerequisite ideas, plain-language model, एउटा example, एउटा practice task, र understanding test गर्ने एउटा तरिका माग्नुहोस्।

entries.source: Ask for the question, learner answer, and expected answer if any part is missing.
entries.value: question, learner answer, र expected answer कुनै भाग छुटेको भए माग्नुहोस्।

entries.source: Ask for the smallest explanation or next experiment.
entries.value: सबैभन्दा सानो explanation वा next experiment माग्नुहोस्।

entries.source: Ask for the smallest hint or a check on your attempted step.
entries.value: सबैभन्दा सानो hint वा तपाईंले प्रयास गरेको step मा check माग्नुहोस्।

entries.source: Ask for the smallest useful hint
entries.value: सबैभन्दा सानो उपयोगी hint माग्नुहोस्

entries.source: Ask for the source text, claim, author, date, and context if missing.
entries.value: छुटेको भए source text, claim, author, date, र context माग्नुहोस्।

entries.source: Ask for the study block length and suggest a break rhythm.
entries.value: study block length माग्नुहोस् र break rhythm सुझाव दिनुहोस्।

entries.source: Ask for the task, target duration, and completion criteria.
entries.value: task, target duration, र completion criteria माग्नुहोस्।

entries.source: Ask for the text and desired length if missing.
entries.value: छुटेको भए text र desired length माग्नुहोस्।

entries.source: Ask for the topic and which side the learner wants; take the opposite side.
entries.value: topic र learner ले चाहेको side माग्नुहोस्; opposite side लिनुहोस्।

entries.source: Ask for the topic in plain language, then request one analogy, one example, and one common misconception.
entries.value: विषयलाई सरल भाषामा बुझाइदिन भन्नुहोस्, त्यसपछि एउटा उपमा, एउटा उदाहरण र एउटा सामान्य भ्रम माग्नुहोस्।

entries.source: Ask for the topic, context, what they tried, and desired help.
entries.value: topic, context, उनीहरूले के प्रयास गरे, र कस्तो help चाहिएको हो सोध्नुहोस्।

entries.source: Ask for the visible text, labels, and the learner's question if the image is not attached.
entries.value: image attached छैन भने visible text, labels, र learner को question माग्नुहोस्।

entries.source: Ask for topic and purpose, then propose the central node and first branches.
entries.value: topic र purpose माग्नुहोस्, त्यसपछि central node र first branches प्रस्ताव गर्नुहोस्।

entries.source: Ask for topic and scope, then propose a first map structure.
entries.value: topic र scope माग्नुहोस्, त्यसपछि first map structure प्रस्ताव गर्नुहोस्।

entries.source: Ask for topic, age/level, and tone; then create a short story setup.
entries.value: topic, age/level, र tone माग्नुहोस्; त्यसपछि छोटो story setup बनाउनुहोस्।

entries.source: Ask for topic, duration, level, and scoring preference.
entries.value: topic, duration, level, र scoring preference माग्नुहोस्।

entries.source: Ask for topic, level, and examiner style; then begin with a warm-up question.
entries.value: topic, level, र examiner style माग्नुहोस्; त्यसपछि warm-up question बाट सुरु गर्नुहोस्।

entries.source: Ask for topic, level, and preferred game vibe; then create the first quest.
entries.value: topic, level, र preferred game vibe माग्नुहोस्; त्यसपछि first quest बनाउनुहोस्।

entries.source: Ask for topic, level, exam date, and source material if needed.
entries.value: topic, level, exam date, र आवश्यक भए source material माग्नुहोस्।

entries.source: Ask for topic, level, question types, and number of items.
entries.value: topic, level, question types, र number of items माग्नुहोस्।

entries.source: Ask group size, topic, time, and desired outcome.
entries.value: group size, topic, time, र desired outcome माग्नुहोस्।

entries.source: Ask instrument/level if relevant, then teach one small concept.
entries.value: relevant भए instrument/level सोध्नुहोस्, त्यसपछि एउटा सानो concept सिकाउनुहोस्।

entries.source: Ask interests, constraints, and curiosity level before recommending paths.
entries.value: path recommend गर्नु अघि interests, constraints, र curiosity level सोध्नुहोस्।

entries.source: Ask me five Socratic questions about this topic. After each answer, tell me what assumption I used and what to test next.
entries.value: यस विषयबारे मलाई पाँच Socratic प्रश्न सोध्नुहोस्। हरेक उत्तरपछि मैले कुन अनुमान प्रयोग गरेँ र अब के जाँच्ने भन्नुहोस्।

entries.source: Ask me one check question
entries.value: मलाई एउटा check question सोध्नुहोस्

entries.source: Ask me questions about this poem
entries.value: मलाई यो कविताको बारेमा प्रश्नहरू सोध्नुहोस्

entries.source: Ask me thesis defense questions
entries.value: मलाई थेसिस डिफेन्सका प्रश्नहरू सोध्नुहोस्

entries.source: Ask one focused diagnostic question quickly. Convert the learner's target into a mastery target internally, then start with a simple question that reveals their mental model.
entries.value: चाँडै एउटा focused diagnostic question सोध्नुहोस्। learner को target लाई internally mastery target मा रूपान्तरण गर्नुहोस्, त्यसपछि उनीहरूको mental model देखाउने simple question बाट सुरु गर्नुहोस्।

entries.source: Ask one sharp goal question, infer sensible defaults, then create a compact learning map with a try-first activity.
entries.value: एउटा sharp goal question सोध्नुहोस्, sensible defaults infer गर्नुहोस्, त्यसपछि try-first activity सहित compact learning map बनाउनुहोस्।

entries.source: Ask predictions, reveal consequences, adjust variables, and summarize principles.
entries.value: predictions सोध्नुहोस्, consequences देखाउनुहोस्, variables adjust गर्नुहोस्, र principles summarize गर्नुहोस्।

entries.source: Ask questions, challenge ideas, and learn history through grounded conversations with public figures from the past.
entries.value: अतीतका सार्वजनिक व्यक्तित्वहरूसँग अर्थपूर्ण कुराकानी गरेर प्रश्नहरू सोध्नुहोस्, विचारहरूलाई चुनौती दिनुहोस् र इतिहास सिक्नुहोस्।

entries.source: Ask Socratic Instruction to find the weak link.
entries.value: Socratic Instruction लाई weak link पत्ता लगाउन भन्नुहोस्।

entries.source: Ask the AI to check that step.
entries.value: AI लाई त्यो step check गर्न भन्नुहोस्।

entries.source: Ask the AI to check your reasoning, not just the result.
entries.value: AI लाई result मात्र होइन, तपाईंको reasoning check गर्न भन्नुहोस्।

entries.source: Ask the AI to check your reasoning.
entries.value: AI लाई तपाईंको reasoning check गर्न भन्नुहोस्।

entries.source: Ask the AI to label uncertainty.
entries.value: AI लाई uncertainty label गर्न भन्नुहोस्।

entries.source: Ask the historical mode to label what is documented, inferred, or simulated.
entries.value: historical mode लाई के अभिलेखित, के अनुमानित र के simulated हो भनेर लेबल गर्न भन्नुहोस्।

entries.source: Ask the learner to explain the topic in plain language first.
entries.value: learner लाई पहिले topic plain language मा explain गर्न भन्नुहोस्।

entries.source: Ask the learner to explain what changed after each hint.
entries.value: हरेक hint पछि के बदलियो भनेर learner लाई explain गर्न भन्नुहोस्।

entries.source: Ask the learner to state their current belief, then test it with a small example.
entries.value: learner लाई आफ्नो current belief बताउन भन्नुहोस्, त्यसपछि सानो example बाट test गर्नुहोस्।

entries.source: Ask the real question
entries.value: वास्तविक प्रश्न सोध्नुहोस्

entries.source: Ask what a different side would claim.
entries.value: अर्को side ले के claim गर्थ्यो सोध्नुहोस्।

entries.source: Ask what a different side, class, era, or source might say.
entries.value: अर्को side, class, era, वा source ले के भन्थ्यो सोध्नुहोस्।

entries.source: Ask what data or observations they have and what decision they need.
entries.value: उनीहरूसँग के data वा observations छन् र कुन decision चाहिएको हो सोध्नुहोस्।

entries.source: Ask what happened, what they felt, and what they want to improve.
entries.value: के भयो, उनीहरूले के महसुस गरे, र के सुधार्न चाहन्छन् सोध्नुहोस्।

entries.source: Ask what must be remembered and what familiar place the learner wants to use.
entries.value: के सम्झनुपर्छ र learner ले कुन familiar place प्रयोग गर्न चाहन्छ सोध्नुहोस्।

entries.source: Ask what the learner wants to be quizzed on if the topic is missing.
entries.value: topic छुटेको भए learner केमा quiz हुन चाहन्छ सोध्नुहोस्।

entries.source: Ask what the learner wants to represent, then propose a simple visual layout.
entries.value: learner के represent गर्न चाहन्छ सोध्नुहोस्, त्यसपछि simple visual layout प्रस्ताव गर्नुहोस्।

entries.source: Ask what the resource is, audience, and what context they need.
entries.value: resource के हो, audience को हो, र कुन context चाहिएको हो सोध्नुहोस्।

entries.source: Ask what they are doing and suggest a low-distraction sound preset.
entries.value: उनीहरूले के गरिरहेका छन् सोध्नुहोस् र low-distraction sound preset सुझाव दिनुहोस्।

entries.source: Ask what they have tried, then give a hint or worked miniature example.
entries.value: उनीहरूले के प्रयास गरेका छन् सोध्नुहोस्, त्यसपछि hint वा worked miniature example दिनुहोस्।

entries.source: Ask your first question and move straight into practice.
entries.value: पहिलो question सोध्नुहोस् र सिधै practice मा जानुहोस्।

entries.source: Ask, evaluate, improve with structure, and retry.
entries.value: सोध्नुहोस्, evaluate गर्नुहोस्, structure सहित improve गर्नुहोस्, र फेरि प्रयास गर्नुहोस्।

entries.source: Assignment Tracker
entries.value: असाइनमेन्ट ट्र्याकर

entries.source: At Inspir, our mission is to democratize learning by making it accessible, engaging, and enjoyable for all. We believe that everyone has the right to quality education, regardless of their background or circumstances. Our platform is designed to provide students with the tools and resources they need to succeed, while also fostering a love of learning. We strive to create a community that is inclusive, supportive, and empowering, where students can connect with each other and with educators from around the world. By making learning fun and accessible, we aim to inspir a generation of lifelong learners who are equipped to tackle the challenges of the future.
entries.value: inspir मा हाम्रो mission सिकाइलाई सबैका लागि पहुँचयोग्य, engaging र रमाइलो बनाएर democratize गर्नु हो। हामी विश्वास गर्छौं कि पृष्ठभूमि वा परिस्थितिबाट अलग, सबैलाई गुणस्तरीय शिक्षाको अधिकार छ। हाम्रो platform विद्यार्थीहरूलाई सफल हुन चाहिने tools र resources दिन डिजाइन गरिएको हो, साथै सिकाइप्रति प्रेम बढाउन पनि। हामी inclusive, supportive र empowering community बनाउन प्रयास गर्छौं, जहाँ विद्यार्थीहरू एकअर्कासँग र संसारभरका educators सँग connect हुन सक्छन्। सिकाइलाई रमाइलो र पहुँचयोग्य बनाएर, हामी भविष्यका challenges सामना गर्न सक्षम lifelong learners को पुस्तालाई प्रेरित गर्ने लक्ष्य राख्छौं।

entries.source: CalOPPA is the first state law in the nation to require commercial websites and online services to post a privacy policy. The law’s reach stretches well beyond California to require a person or company in the United States (and conceivable the world) that operates websites collecting personally identifiable information from California consumers to post a conspicuous privacy policy on its website stating exactly the information being collected and those individuals with whom it is being shared, and to comply with this policy.
entries.value: CalOPPA commercial websites र online services लाई privacy policy post गर्न required गर्ने राष्ट्रको पहिलो state law हो। यस law को reach California भन्दा धेरै बाहिर फैलिन्छ, जसले California consumers बाट personally identifiable information collect गर्ने websites चलाउने United States (र सम्भवतः संसार) का व्यक्ति वा company लाई आफ्नो website मा स्पष्ट privacy policy post गर्न required गर्छ, जसमा exactly कुन information collect भइरहेको छ र कोसँग share भइरहेको छ भनिएको हुन्छ, र त्यस policy को पालना गर्नुपर्ने हुन्छ।

entries.source: Career Explorer AI Learning Mode is a focused way to use AI for learning instead of passive answer collection. The mode is built around a specific job: Explore careers through interests, skills, day-in-the-life examples, and next steps.
entries.value: Career Explorer AI Learning Mode निष्क्रिय उत्तर सङ्कलनको सट्टा सिकाइका लागि AI प्रयोग गर्ने केन्द्रित तरिका हो। यो mode एउटा स्पष्ट काम वरिपरि बनाइएको छ: interests, skills, day-in-the-life examples, र next steps मार्फत careers explore गर्नुहोस्।

entries.value: केस स्टडी सिम्युलेटर

entries.source: case study simulator AI
entries.value: case अध्ययन simulator AI

entries.source: Case Study Simulator AI Learning Mode is a focused way to use AI for learning instead of passive answer collection. The mode is built around a specific job: Enter a realistic case, make decisions, see consequences, and learn the principle behind each choice.
entries.value: Case Study Simulator AI Learning Mode निष्क्रिय उत्तर सङ्कलनको सट्टा सिकाइका लागि AI प्रयोग गर्ने केन्द्रित तरिका हो। यो mode एउटा स्पष्ट काम वरिपरि बनाइएको छ: realistic case मा पस्नुहोस्, decisions लिनुहोस्, consequences हेर्नुहोस्, र प्रत्येक choice पछाडिको principle सिक्नुहोस्।
